worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "integration",
  "name": "Integration Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Üçüncü parti entegrasyonları - API yönetimi, webhook ve harici servis bağlantıları",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "integration",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization"],
    "optional": ["notification"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["IIntegrationService", "IWebhookService", "IApiKeyService"],
    "events": [
      "integration.connected",
      "integration.disconnected",
      "webhook.triggered",
      "webhook.failed",
      "api_key.created",
      "api_key.revoked"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "integration:view",
      "integration:configure",
      "webhook:manage",
      "api_key:create",
      "api_key:revoke"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "professional",
    "features": {
      "professional": ["basic_webhooks", "api_keys"],
      "business": ["basic_webhooks", "api_keys", "custom_integrations", "data_sync"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_webhooks", "api_keys", "custom_integrations", "data_sync", "enterprise_connectors", "custom_development"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "API key management",
    "Webhook management",
    "Third-party app connectors",
    "OAuth integrations",
    "Data export/import",
    "Zapier integration",
    "Custom API development",
    "Rate limiting",
    "Usage analytics"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q4 2026"
}
